description: Shared type definitions for TransparencIA lexicons.

location.description: A geographic location referenced in content. Coordinates use WGS 84 (EPSG:4326).

lat.description: Latitude as a decimal string (AT Protocol does not support floats). Example: '19.4326'.

lng.description: Longitude as a decimal string. Example: '-99.1332'.

relevance.description: How central this location is to the content.

person.description: A person mentioned in content, with optional role and sentiment analysis.

role.description: Role, title, or position (e.g., 'Presidente de México').

sentiment.description: How the content portrays this person.

sentimentScore.description: Numeric sentiment score as a decimal string. 0.0 = extremely negative, 0.5 = neutral, 1.0 = extremely positive.

sentimentReasoning.description: Explanation of why this sentiment was assigned.

relevance.description: How central this person is to the article.

entityId.description: Persistent identifier for cross-article entity linking (e.g., Wikidata QID like Q615, or a canonical slug).

entityIdType.description: Identifier system used for entityId, so consumers know how to resolve it.

claim.description: A factual claim or assertion extracted from content.

confidence.description: Confidence that this is a verifiable factual claim (decimal string 0-1).

economicIndicator.description: An economic data point mentioned in content.

value.description: The reported value as a string (e.g., '2.3%', '$17.45').

timelineEntry.description: A chronological event mentioned in content.

date.description: Date or date range as mentioned in the article (free-form, e.g., 'marzo 2026', '15 de enero').

organization.description: An organization, company, or brand mentioned in content.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol if publicly traded (e.g., 'AAPL', 'BIMBOA.MX').

sentiment.description: How the content portrays this organization.

sentimentScore.description: Numeric sentiment score as a decimal string. 0.0 = extremely negative, 0.5 = neutral, 1.0 = extremely positive.

sentimentReasoning.description: Explanation of why this sentiment was assigned.

relevance.description: How central this organization is to the article.

entityId.description: Persistent identifier for cross-article entity linking (e.g., Wikidata QID like Q478214, LEI, or a canonical slug).

entityIdType.description: Identifier system used for entityId, so consumers know how to resolve it.

structuredRef.description: A typed reference to an external entity (law, stock, product, team, etc.).

type.description: What kind of reference this is.

value.description: The reference value (e.g., 'Ley General de Salud Art. 73', 'AAPL', 'Liga MX').

url.description: Optional URL to the referenced entity.
